Default User-Agent string used by the RAG indexer's HTTP calls

Source: R/rag-http.R
rag_user_agent.Rd

Exposed as a function (rather than a hidden package constant) so every helper that needs a User-Agent default can list it in its signature, e.g. rag_request(url, user_agent = rag_user_agent()).

Usage

rag_user_agent()

Value

Character scalar.
